_disclaimer: UNVERIFIED CANDIDATES to VET before use. These are public remote MCP endpoints gathered from public registries (registry.modelcontextprotocol.io, awesome-remote-mcp-servers, mcp.so). Before watching any of them: (1) confirm the endpoint is live and that watching it is consistent with the provider's terms; (2) run `snapshot` once and keep only the ones that return tools (others are recorded as unreachable); (3) if you find a genuine `suspicious` change, DISCLOSE to the maintainer before publishing their name. The report only ever names servers you keep in this list.
_auth_note: These are the no-auth endpoints (best for a watch harness — no credentials). Auth-required servers (Zapier, Linear, Sentry, Asana, GitHub, Atlassian, etc.) can be added with a `headers` field carrying a bearer token you own.
_transport_note: The harness speaks MCP Streamable HTTP (initialize handshake + tools/list) and falls back to a plain tools/list. Some servers require session handshakes or SSE the harness may not fully negotiate; those simply show up as unreachable — no harm.
